card.headline: Severe pain + OS_twister failing
reasons: OS_twister performance stays near zero at minimal difficulty—protocol is failing; re-teach or swap to avoid wasted time.
Pain is consistently rated very high while performance remains poor—needs pain/safety check before progressing rehab.

params.topic: Pain/safety check; clarify pain source and whether to pause/modify exercises

items.text: OS_twister performance stays near zero at minimal difficulty—protocol is failing; re-teach or swap to avoid wasted time.
Pain is consistently rated very high while performance remains poor—needs pain/safety check before progressing rehab.

checkin.wins: Your Blobs work stayed steady all week, even when the targets felt quicker and less forgiving. You also stacked a strong run from Friday into the weekend and really showed up.
checkin.to_improve: If Hockey AR felt easy to skip, try slipping in a short round early in a session to keep it familiar.
